intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 80 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 11% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 15:00 at 68%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% for 15:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. 68% for 15:00. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/7. 5:00 at 82%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 82% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 82% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/7. 82% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/7. 82% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 15:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 68% for 15:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 68%, 85-95 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/7. 45 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 85% × 5:00. Then 40min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 4/7. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 3 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4/7. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 85% × 5:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 55% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 68-68% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 55% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 55% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 55% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 72% done. 1 intervals left. 20 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 6 of 7. Target: 82% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65 minutes of work done. 20 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6/7. 65 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 6. 1 to go. 20 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 10:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. 10:00 of smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 68%, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 88% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 88% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 80 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 88% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
